creator: daniel@morante.net
text:
Created attachment 205905
Unified diff to restore the port

net/pecl-mosquitto was removed due to PHP 5.6 being EOL.  However version 0.4.0 can run on php 7.x.

I did some local tests on 12.0-RELEASE with all three current version of PHP (7.1, 7.2, 7.3) to make sure it works.

SVN commands used:

svnlite copy https://svn.FreeBSD.org/ports/head/net/pecl-mosquitto@481545 net/pecl-mosquitto
